title: Flowering Apple Trees
body:
This datapacks adds apple trees!

### How To Get An Apple Tree

To make an apple tree sapling you can take an oak sapling and surround it in apples in a crafting table!

### How The Apple Tree Works

When the apple tree grows into a full tree it won't have any apples at first. However after some time it will grow flowers and then soon after it will produce apples! It will contine a flower and produce apples until it eventually dies. Once it dies it will no longer produce apples but you can still chop it down and plant a new one.
